values.DOTA_Tooltip_ability_base_ability_windra: Increases movement speed and adds evasion from all physical attacks.
Windrun reduces physical damage taken by %physical_damage_pct%%%, and grants invisibility that is not broken by attacking or casting spells.
Lyralei enchants gusts of winds to fight incoming attacks.
Activating Windrun will evade incoming projectiles.
Shackles the target to an enemy unit or tree in a line directly behind it.  If no unit or tree is present, the stun duration is reduced to %fail_stun_duration%.
Shackleshot applies to all units and trees behind the target unit and grants Windranger bonus attack damage for each additional shackled unit and tree. Creeps and trees grant less bonus damage.
Windranger's variety of bow skills includes an arrow with thick ropes attached to encumber any escaping target.
This spell can shackle two enemies together, stunning them both.
Can shackle the target to an enemy unit or tree at most %shackle_distance% behind the target.

CHANNELED - Windranger charges her bow for up to %abilitychanneltime% second for a single powerful shot, which deals more damage the longer it is charged. The arrow damages and slows enemies' movement speed along its path. For each enemy that Powershot hits, its damage and slow is reduced.
Enemy heroes hit are executed if below a health threshold. The execute threshold is based on the arrow's power.
During her early years of training, Lyralei learned to fire powerful arrows that cleaved even trees to reach their targets.
Powershot will destroy trees in its area of effect.

Windranger channels the wind to gain %bonus_attack_speed% additional attack speed against a single enemy unit or structure, though with a reduction to her attack damage.  Extra damage from secondary item effects is not reduced.

Focus Fire no longer requires a target, instead firing at random enemies within Windranger's attack range + %bonus_range%. Fires a fixed number of attacks per second, and can only hit the same enemy every 4 shots. Prioritizes Heroes.
Lyralei's ability to bombard opponents with a flurry of arrows is unparalleled - even at the expense of accuracy.
Issuing a Hold Position command will pause Windranger's attacks.
values.DOTA_Tooltip_ability_base_ability_vengef: Vengeful Spirit lets loose a wicked cry, weakening the total attack damage and armor of enemies, and giving vision of the path ahead.
Shendel's haunting voice hints at her approaching vindication.

Instantaneously swaps positions with a target Hero, friend or enemy. Nether Swap interrupts channeling abilities on the target. Enemy Swapped units take damage. Vengeful Spirit and allied swapped units gain a barrier equal to the damage dealt.
Martyrdom is a small price to pay for vengeance.
Trees near Vengeful Spirit and the target will be destroyed when the spell is cast.
Channeling spells are interrupted by Nether Swap.
Fires a magic missile at an enemy unit, stunning and dealing damage.
Magic Missile deals %damage_per_lasthit% bonus damage for every creep the enemy has killed.
Bounces once on an enemy, prioritizing heroes, within %bounce_range_pct%%% of Magic Missile's current cast range from the first target.
A simple Skywrath technique, the magic missile is Shendel's primary tool for vengeance.
Vengeful Spirit's presence increases the damage of nearby friendly heroes.

Upon death, creates a strong illusion of Vengeful Spirit that deals full damage, takes increased damage, and can cast all of her spells. If the illusion is alive when Vengeful Spirit respawn, she will take its place. XP earned by her illusion is given to her. Strong Illusions are not instantly killed by spells.
Although they may not share her undying passion for revenge, allies do draw on her fanaticism in combat.
values.DOTA_Tooltip_ability_base_ability_sven_w: Warcry is now undispellable and passively grants %shard_passive_armor% armor to all allies near Sven. Increases active movement speed bonus.
Warcry provides a physical damage barrier.
Sven's Warcry heartens his allied heroes for battle, increasing their armor and movement speed. Lasts %duration% seconds.
Calling a few lines from the Vigil Codex fortifies Sven's obedience to his rogue code. So poetic!
values.DOTA_Tooltip_ability_base_ability_sven_s: Sven unleashes his magical gauntlet that deals damage and stuns enemy units in a small area around the target.

Increases cast range and applies a basic dispel on the target. Can be cast on invulnerable targets. If alt-cast, it deals an additional %scepter_bonus_damage% damage and Sven travels with the Storm Hammer.
The Rogue Knight's iron gauntlet, taken from the school of his father, strikes his foes to their core.
values.DOTA_Tooltip_ability_base_ability_sven_g: Sven strikes with great force, cleaving all nearby enemy units with his attack.
The Vigil Knights still seek to reclaim the stolen Outcast Blade from Sven, a weapon capable of cutting wide swaths through lesser warriors.
Sven channels his rogue strength, granting bonus damage and slow resistance for %abilityduration% seconds.
With the strength that shattered the Sacred Helm, the Rogue Knight stands unopposed in melee combat.
The bonus damage is based on base damage and the primary attribute of Sven.
values.DOTA_Tooltip_ability_base_ability_sniper: Increases vision range, Headshot chance, and attack range. Slows you by %slow%%% for the duration and restricts your vision to a frontal cone.
While Take Aim is active, Sniper's attacks do not reveal him from fog of war.
Kardel always takes it upon himself to stay as far from harm as he can while still performing his role - taking perfect aim.

Consumes a charge to launch a ball of shrapnel that showers the target area in explosive pellets. Enemies are subject to damage and slowed movement. Reveals the targeted area. Shrapnel charges restore every %abilitychargerestoretime% seconds.
Shrapnel slow and damage are increased, but duration is decreased.
Kardel's modular rifle also fires incendiary rounds, useful for assaulting entrenched locations.
Damage is dealt 11 times, immediately at spell effect then every second.
Provides vision in the targeted area.

Sniper increases his accuracy, giving him a chance to deal extra damage and knock back his enemies. Knockback distance increases based on how close the enemy is to Sniper. Headshots briefly slow enemy movement and attack speed by %slow%%%.
Taking potshots at steepstalkers in his childhood has been thoroughly refined into perfect leads on enemy combatants.

Sniper locks onto a target enemy unit and, after a short aiming duration, fires a devastating shot that deals Sniper's attack damage plus bonus damage at long range and mini-stuns the target. Whenever Sniper kills an enemy hero, Assassinate is refreshed.
Causes Assassinate to fire quicker and stun the enemy target.
In order to fulfill the prophecy and return to his home town, Kardel must make another shot as perfect as the one on the day of his ancient test.
Crosshair effect is only visible to allies.
values.DOTA_Tooltip_ability_base_ability_skywra: Mystic Flare

Skywrath Mage uses his ultimate magical ability to conjure a precise and violent mystical field that lays waste to his adversaries. Deals massive damage distributed evenly among any Heroes in the area over %duration% seconds.
Only the most practiced of Skywrath sorcerers could hope to shape the skies into such a storm.
Mystic Flare only affects Heroes. Mystic Flare does not damage creep heroes.
Spell immune enemies do not count toward the damage distribution.
Mystic Flare will damage enemy creeps if no enemy heroes are present.
Mystic Flare will immediately destroy illusions.
RADIUS:
DURATION:
DAMAGE:

When Skywrath Mage casts Mystic Flare, another Mystic Flare will be created on the position of a different random target enemy within %scepter_radius% range of the original target. Heroes will take priority.
Concussive Shot
Skywrath Mage sets off a long range shot that hits the closest hero within a long range.  Upon impact, it deals damage and slows in an area of effect.
Those who serve the court of the Ghastly Eyrie are ever locked in covert war. One must always know where danger lurks nearest.
If no enemy heroes are in range or they are in fog, Concussive Shot targets the nearest enemy creep.
Damages creeps around the impact area.
Provides 400 vision around the projectile, and reveals the target area for 3.34 seconds upon impact.
SHOT RANGE:
DAMAGE RADIUS:
DAMAGE:
SLOW DURATION:
%SLOW:
When Skywrath Mage casts Concussive Shot, a different random target within %scepter_radius% range of the original target will be hit with the same ability. Heroes will take priority.
Arcane Bolt
Skywrath Mage launches a slow-moving bolt of arcane magic, dealing damage to an enemy unit based on Skywrath Mage's intelligence.
Within the Ghastly Eyrie's endless intrigue, only the clever and calm can hope to survive.
The projectile moves very slowly (500 ms), providing 325 vision around it.  Upon impact, it will reveal the target area for 3.34 seconds.
Arcane Bolt cannot be disjointed.
BASE DAMAGE:
INT DAMAGE MULTIPLIER:

When Skywrath Mage casts Arcane Bolt, %total_bolt_count% bolts are created, one aimed at the original target, and the other at a random enemy within %extra_bolt_search_radius% range of the original target. Heroes will take priority.
Ancient Seal
Skywrath Mage seals the targeted unit with an ancient rune, silencing it and causing it to take additional damage from spells.
A holy incantation, whosoever finds themselves touched by Avilliva's sigil must suffer in penitent silence.
The magic damage resistance reduction doesn't affect creeps.
%INCREASED MAGIC DAMAGE:
DURATION:
Anytime Skywrath Mage casts Ancient Seal, a different random target within %scepter_radius% range of the original target will be affected by the same ability. Heroes will take priority.
values.DOTA_Tooltip_Ability_talent_attributes_b: When attacked there is a chance to disarm attacker.
Add a chance of blocking physical damage.
Increases armor based on your primary attribute.
Increase your area of effect size.
values.DOTA_Tooltip_ability_base_ability_sand_k: Sand King strikes an area, performing an attack on all enemies in the area of effect, dealing extra damage to each. Enemies within an innermost radius of %inner_radius% take %inner_radius_bonus_damage_pct%%% extra damage. Applies Caustic Finale and a slow to all enemies hit.
Crixalis is certainly capable of mercy, but the soul of the sand finds few foes worth sparing.

A Caustic Finale explosion that deals %caustic_damage_pct%%% damage is created around every enemy hero hit in Stinger's innermost radius. Does not apply to strikes created by Aghanim's Scepter upgrade.
Sand King creates a fearsome sandstorm that damages enemy units and grants Sand King Invisibility while he is in it. The effect ends when Sand King leaves the area.
Sand Storm has increased radius and grants Sand King Invisibility while in it.

Sand Storm follows Sand King at a rate of %sand_storm_move_speed_pct%%% of his movement speed and is still active at a distance of up to %sand_storm_max_distance_from_caster% units away from Sand King.
Some say Crixalis is a mirage; his carapace appearing then vanishing between the whirling sands of the Scintillant Waste.
Sand Storm can be used to dodge projectiles.
Sand King briefly becomes visible upon attacking or using spells while in Sand Storm. Sand King will become invisible again in %fade_delay% seconds.
When Sand King attacks enemies in Sand Storm, he applies a blinding debuff to the target.

After a cast point of %abilitycastpoint% seconds, Sand King sends a disturbance into the earth, causing it to shudder violently. All enemies caught within range will take damage and become slowed. Each subsequent pulse increases the radius of damage dealt.
Increases Epicenter damage per pulse. Every %shard_interval%s causes a small single Epicenter Pulse around Sand King.
Many an explorer was lost to the quicksands of the Scintillant Waste.
The pulses are centered on Sand King, not where he first cast the spell.

When the pulses start, %scepter_explosions_per_pulse% Stinger attack areas are created every %spine_tick_rate%s at random locations, each measuring %scepter_explosion_radius_pct%%% of the Epicenter's current radius, that apply %spine_damage_pct%%% of Stinger damage to enemies hit. Shard pulses cause %shard_explosions_per_pulse% attack(s).

Sand King burrows into the ground and tunnels forward, damaging and stunning enemy units above him as he resurfaces. Adds Caustic Finale poison to heroes hit

Can be put on alt-cast to immediately cast in the desired direction, without walking towards the targeted location.
Crixalis often lies in wait, burrowing under the surface to ambush his adversaries.
Does not trigger spell block or spell reflect.

Burrowstrike becomes a vector-targeted ability, allowing Sand King to create a secondary burrowstrike past his initial target location. The secondary burrowstrike distance and damage can be up to %underground_distance_pct%%% of a normal burrowstrike.
values.DOTA_Tooltip_ability_base_ability_pudge_: A toxic cloud that deals intense damage and slows movement--harming not only enemy units but Pudge himself.
While Rot is activated, Pudge gains %attack_damage_per_second_tooltip%%% bonus attack damage every second. Damage bonus decays rapidly over %time_for_decay_tooltip%s while Rot is deactivated.
Increases Rot radius and damage, and causes it to reduce enemy Health Restoration.
A foul odor precedes a toxic, choking gas, emanating from the Butcher's putrid, ever-swelling mass.
If Pudge is silenced, he can't deactivate Rot if it's activated.

Launches a bloody hook toward a unit or location. The hook will snag the first unit it encounters, dragging the unit back to Pudge, killing it if it's a non-ancient creep and dealing damage if it is an enemy otherwise.

When Meat Hook hits an enemy, it deals bonus damage based on the distance pulled.

When Meat Hook hits an ally, Meat Hook's cooldown is reduced by %cooldown_reduction_pct_allied_hook%%%.
Meat Hook deals bonus damage based on the distance pulled, but base damage is reduced.
The Butcher's hook is a symbolic nightmare, its curved blade a frightening reminder of his slaughterous intent.
Interrupts channeling spells of the primary target if it's an enemy.
Meat Hook can go through trees, cliffs, buildings, ancient units and Roshan.
Meat Hook can drag friendly units, but they won't be damaged.
Meat Hook can hit and drag runes to Pudge, refunding the Hook's mana cost.
Pudge covers himself with a layer of flesh that blocks damage of any type taken from any source.
The Butcher gives new meaning to the words 'meat shield.'

CHANNELED - Pudge chows down on an enemy unit, disabling it and dealing damage over time. Damage is increased by Pudge's Strength and heals him for the total amount. Pudge pulls the unit at a rate of %pull_units_per_second% units, up to a minimum of %pull_distance_limit% range.
Dismember increases Strength when dealing damage to heroes.
'When I'm through with these vermin, they'll be fit for a pie!'
If a unit becomes invisible while Dismembered, it will still be under the effects of Dismember.
values.DOTA_Tooltip_ability_base_ability_phanto: Throws a dagger slowing the enemy unit's movement speed, dealing %base_damage%+%attack_factor_tooltip%%% of Phantom Assassin's attack damage as physical damage and applying attack effects from items and abilities.

Whenever a unit is non-fatally hit by Stifling Dagger, they receive a stacking debuff that lasts for %dagger_recast_time% seconds. When a unit dies, a Stifling Dagger with %dagger_secondary_reduce%%% damage and slow duration values is cast on a random nearby unit for every stack of the debuff, prioritizing heroes.
If an attack effect is chance-based, the chance of its application will be the same as its chance to occur.
Spell-immune enemies are not affected by Stifling Dagger's slow.
Stifling Dagger grants vision around its location while it travels and upon impact.
The first skill learned by the Sisters of the Veil often signals an incoming hit.
Teleports to a unit, friendly or enemy, and grants bonus attack speed while attacking if it's an enemy unit.
Mortred's silken veil is the last thing her unfortunate target sees.
Coup de Grace procs every %attacks_to_proc% attacks on the same hero or %attacks_to_proc_creeps% attacks on non hero units. Stifling Dagger counts as %two_tooltip% attacks.

Phantom Assassin refines her combat abilities, acquiring a chance of gaining Deadly Focus with each attack. When attacking with Deadly Focus, Phantom Assassin will consume the buff and guarantee a critical hit. Stifling Dagger has a bonus chance to cause Deadly Focus.
A divine strike, Mortred honors her opponent by choosing them for death.
Phantom Assassin blurs her body, disjointing incoming projectiles, increasing her movement speed, causing her to be impossible to see until she comes near enemy heroes or towers.
Decreases Cooldown. Any time Phantom Assassin gets a hero kill, her ability cooldowns advance %cooldown_refund_pct%%% of their max cooldown values.
With Scepter, only non-ultimate spells will refresh.
Meditation allows a Veiled Sister to carefully anticipate her opponents in combat.
Attacking Roshan with a regular attack will dispel Blur.
values.DOTA_Tooltip_ability_base_ability_mirana: Calls down a wave of meteors to damage nearby enemy units. The closest enemy unit to Mirana in a %starfall_secondary_radius% radius will be struck a second time.
Starstorm's second meteor deals more damage and blinds the target.
The Goddess breaks the strata to empower her Princess in the time of need.
Starstorm is not blocked by Linken's Sphere.
Starstorm will choose a new target for the second meteor if the first died before impact.
Mirana leaps forward into battle, empowering herself with a ferocious roar that grants bonus attack and movement speed. Speed bonus lasts %leap_bonus_duration% seconds.
Grants +%additional_charges% Leap charge. Attacks during the Leap buff critically strike for %crit_damage_pct%%% damage.
Upon landing, Leap roots targets in a %root_radius% radius for %root_duration%s.
None can fail to recognize Mirana's iconic white beast in the heat of battle.

Turns Mirana and all allied heroes invisible and grants bonus movement speed. Mirana gains bonus outgoing damage during the duration. If a hero is revealed, invisibility will restore after the fade delay as long as Moonlight Shadow's duration has not expired.
Her tenure with Selemene allows Mirana to eclipse the ground, wrapping her allies in a cloak of shadows.
Units affected will not auto attack enemies.

Fires a long-range arrow with deadly precision, which stuns and damages the first enemy unit it strikes. The stun duration ranges from %arrow_min_stun% to %arrow_max_stun% seconds, with bonus damage up to %arrow_bonus_damage% added, based on the distance the arrow travels to its target. Instantly kills the first non-ancient creep it hits.
Causes Sacred Arrow to release a Starstorm on enemies along the travel path of the primary arrow, releasing a second Starstorm that deals less damage to the impacted unit.
Lunar energies make the Princess of the Moon's arrows more deadly than most.
For every 150 distance the arrow travels, the stun duration upon impact increases by 0.5 seconds, and the bonus damage added increases by 14.
Sacred Arrow can hit invisible units.
Starstruck does not apply to the second Starstorm from Aghanim's Scepter.
values.DOTA_Tooltip_ability_base_ability_lycan_: The very enchantment that twisted his being also summons canine familiars.

Summons %wolf_count% wolves to aid Lycan in battle. At level 3, wolves gain Permanent Invisibility, and at level 4 wolves gain Cripple that gives 20% chance to cripple the target, causing 8 damage per second and lose 60 attack speed for 4 seconds.
Summoned Wolves are invulnerable and uncontrollable spirits that do not attack, but provide health and damage bonuses to Lycan.

Max Level increased to %max_level%. Level 5 wolves gain Hamstring, which empowers their attacks to root enemies and cause them to take more physical damage on attacks. Level 6 wolves have Hightail, an active ability that gives wolves phased movement, evasion, movespeed, and attack speed.
Causes one of your creep waves to include one uncontrollable wolf that moves with the wave. Additionally, wolves spawned this way may Cripple towers.
Using this spell will replace currently active summoned Wolves.
Gives %maim_chance%%% to cripple the target, causing %maim_damage% damage per second and lose %maim_attack_speed% Attack Speed for %maim_duration% seconds.
The wolf gains a short burst of energy, gaining phased movement, evasion, hasted movement speed, and attack speed.
The wolf bites down on an enemy's hamstring, rooting them for a short duration. After the bite, the next %damage_boost_stacks% attacks from units controlled by Lycan deal bonus damage.
Forever a slave to his lycanthropy, Banehallow has come to accept his curse, and embrace his own savagery.
Lycan assumes his lupine form, granting him critical strikes and added vision at night. During Shapeshift, Lycan moves at increased speed and cannot be slowed.
Movement and critical strike bonuses are also applied to all units under Lycan's control. Enemy heroes killed by Lycan or his units extends Shapeshift duration by %kill_duration_extension%s.
Hex doesn't remove Lycan's movement speed.
Ranged heroes will lose attack range during Shapeshift, though bonus range abilities can modify that (i.e. Arctic Burn)
Blood-curdling wolf cries signal to opponents that Banehallow is among them.
Strikes fear into enemies, reducing armor and attack damage of all enemies within %radius% range of Lycan and his wolves. At night, Howl's armor and attack damage reductions are global.
His animalistic symbiosis with canine kind gives Banehallow enhanced reflexes and hunting capabilities.
Increases the HP regeneration and damage of Lycan and all units under his control.
values.DOTA_Tooltip_ability_base_ability_lion_v: Transforms an enemy unit into a harmless beast, with all special abilities disabled.
Lion is compelled to share his transfiguration, twisting the essence of those who oppose him.
The target will have a base movement speed of %movespeed%, but buffs granting maximum movement speed won't be disabled.
values.DOTA_Tooltip_ability_base_ability_lion_m:
CHANNELED - Channels magical energy, taking mana and slowing enemies over time. If the enemy has no mana remaining, the slow is increased by %movespeed_bonus_when_empty_pct%%%.

Can target allies to give them mana and movement speed at a %ally_pct%%% rate.
Mana Drain deals damage equal to %damage_pct%%% of mana stolen.
Causes Mana Drain to affect up to %shard_bonus_targets% additional enemies and increases break distance. Lion becomes Debuff Immune with %magic_resist%%% magic resistance while channeling.
Lesser magi are nothing more than a source of magical restoration for the Demon Witch.
values.DOTA_Tooltip_ability_base_ability_lion_i: Rock spikes burst from the earth along a straight path. Enemy units are hurled into the air, then are stunned and take damage when they fall.
The Demon Witch exercises his demonic covenant, opening a fissure from hell.
The spikes move at %speed% units per second.
Does not trigger spell block or spell reflect.
values.DOTA_Tooltip_ability_base_ability_lion_f: Rips at an enemy unit, trying to turn it inside-out. Deals massive damage and grows stronger with each life it consumes.

After casting Finger of Death, Lion switches from ranged to melee attacks and gains bonus damage and cleave. Enemy heroes killed within %punch_grace_period%s of being punched will add Finger of Death stacks.
Increases damage. Decreases cooldown. Finger of Death hits all units in a small area.
Lion's disfigured hand is also the source of his greatest power, capable of flooding victims with malefic force.
Finger of Death has a %damage_delay% delay before the damage is applied after the spell is cast, allowing certain abilities to avoid the damage.
Finger of Death only gains damage if the enemy hero dies within %grace_period% seconds of being affected by Finger of Death.
values.DOTA_Tooltip_ability_base_ability_lina_l: Summons a column of flames that damages and stuns enemies.
Lina's essence allows her to focus the sun's energies, causing air to combust at will.
Light Strike Array will destroy trees in its area of effect.
Fires off a bolt of lightning at a single enemy unit, dealing massive damage.
Casting Laguna Blade temporarily supercharges Lina, granting her stacks of Fiery Soul.
%barrier_pct%%% of the damage dealt is converted to an all damage barrier for Lina. Barrier lasts for %barrier_duration%s.
The air around Lina becomes so intensely torrid that it scorches a foe that comes too close with white-hot lightning.
Laguna Blade has a %damage_delay% delay before the damage is applied after the spell is cast, allowing certain abilities to avoid the damage.
values.DOTA_Tooltip_ability_base_ability_lina_f: Grants bonus attack and movement speed each time Lina hits an enemy with a spell. Stacks with itself. Lasts %fiery_soul_stack_duration% seconds.
Dancing flames embody Lina's playful nature, bringing out her true blazing self.
Duration refreshes each time an opponent is hit with a spell.
Using items does not trigger Fiery Soul.
values.DOTA_Tooltip_ability_base_ability_lina_d: Lina channels the breath of a dragon, sending out a wave of fire that scorches every enemy in its path.
In the scorched barren of Misrule, Lina learned to manipulate the fiery breath of the Desert Wyrm as a form of entertainment.
Dragon Slave can hit units up to 1225 units away.
Does not trigger spell block or spell reflect.
values.DOTA_Tooltip_ability_base_ability_leshra: Splits the earth under enemies. Deals damage and stuns for a short duration.

Causes Split Earth to repeat in the same location %shard_max_count% additional times, with a %shard_secondary_delay% second delay between each one. Each time the radius increases by %shard_radius_increase%. Split Earth echo location is visible to both teams.
Twisting nature to his vile will, the shifting earth consumes those unlucky enough to cross Leshrac's path.
Split Earth will destroy trees in its area of effect.
There is a %delay% second delay before the effect is applied.
Creates waves of damaging energy around Leshrac, one per second, to damage nearby enemy units. Drains Leshrac's mana with each pulse.
If necessary, the Tormented Soul can manipulate space time itself, ravaging lesser beings.
Summons a lightning storm that blasts the target enemy unit, then strikes any nearby enemy units. Struck enemies have their move speed slowed.
The Tormented Soul's mastery of the elements is evident in the massive storms that strike down armies before him.
Saturates the area around Leshrac with magical explosions that deal pure damage to enemy units and buildings.  The fewer units available to attack, the more damage those units will take.
Diabolic Edict hits enemies with an increased explosion rate but it no longer damages buildings.
Chronoptic energy bursts from one plane to the other, evaporating anything it touches.
The explosions will continue even if Leshrac is killed.
values.DOTA_Tooltip_ability_base_ability_gyroco: Launches a salvo of rockets at nearby enemy units in a radius around the Gyrocopter. Lasts %barrage_duration% seconds.
Every successful hit of a Rocket Barrage rocket on an enemy hero increases Gyrocopter's movement speed.
Aurel's new craft has an increased payload for rockets, enhancing their rapid-fire capabilities.
Rocket Barrage can't hit units Gyrocopter has no vision over.
Rocket Barrage fired from Homing Missiles do not trigger Afterburner.

Fires a homing missile to seek the targeted enemy unit. The missile gains speed over time, dealing damage and stunning when it impacts the target. Enemy units can destroy the missile before it reaches its target.

Homing Missiles now constantly fires the current level of Rocket Barrage in a %shard_radius% area of effect after %shard_delay% second of being cast. This Rocket Barrage prioritizes the Homing Missile target.
The biggest missile Aurel could possibly attach to his craft, The Bomb has carefully calculated aerodynamics and explosives for maximum impact.
Towers do half damage to the missile.
The crosshair effect is visible to allies only.
The missile will follow and hit invisible units.

Gyrocopter's attacks hit all enemy units in an area around it for a limited number of attacks.  Only the main target of attacks will receive attack bonuses such as Critical Strike.  Lasts %abilityduration% seconds or until the attacks are used.
Adds a Side Gunner that at random attacks enemy units near Gyrocopter. When Flak Cannon is active, side gunner attacks 2 units instead. Prioritizes furthest unit away within its range.
This newly revamped Gyrocopter has attached enough armaments to assault in a 360 degree radius.
Attack range for the primary attack is unchanged.
Call down %total_strikes% aerial missile strikes that slow and damage enemy units in a target area. Each strike is %strike_separation% distance from the previous one.

The delay between hits is decreased by %bonus_strike_delay%s. Any enemy hero hit by a call down missile strike will be marked, and another, tracking missile strike that has a %tracking_strike_radius% impact radius will be fired at them. This missile deals %tracking_missile_damage%%% damage.
The visual indicator is visible to allies only.
values.DOTA_Tooltip_ability_base_ability_drow_r: Releases a wave that silences and knocks back and reveals invisible enemy units. Knockback distance is relative to how close they are to Drow.
Traxex is rather fond of the tranquility of physical combat, calling on her Drow heritage to end the incantations of opposing magi.
CHANNELED - Drow releases a flurry of arrows in continuous salvos, hitting enemies for extra damage and applying Frost Arrows. Lasts up to %abilitychanneltime% seconds.
Drow can move slowly and use items while casting Multishot.
In the ranger's youth, learning to fire multiple arrows at once was considered a distracting frivolity. In the war of the Ancients, such technique has become strange necessity.
Arrow base damage pierces magic immunity.
Frost Arrows' damage and slow do not pierce magic immunity.
CHANNELED - Drow releases a flurry of arrows in continuous salvos, hitting enemies for extra damage and applying Frost Arrows. Lasts up to %abilitychanneltime% seconds.
Drow can move slowly and use items while casting Multishot.
In the ranger's youth, learning to fire multiple arrows at once was considered a distracting frivolity. In the war of the Ancients, such technique has become strange necessity.
Arrow base damage pierces magic immunity.
Frost Arrows' damage and slow do not pierce magic immunity.

Drow's experiences in battle grant her a chance to launch arrows with incredible accuracy and effectiveness. Pierces through the enemy's defenses, ignoring their base armor. This ability is disabled if there is an enemy hero within %disable_range% range.
The Drow Ranger is the epitome of archery prowess.
Adds a freezing effect to Drow's attacks, slowing enemy movement and dealing bonus damage.  Slow lasts %abilityduration% seconds.

Frost Arrows now apply a Hypothermia stack to enemies, increasing damage from Frost Arrows and reducing their regeneration per stack. If an enemy dies with Hypothermia stacks, they burst and deal damage per stack and slow in an area around it.
Ice-encased arrows pierce the silence, chilling their victims to the core.
The slow duration is refreshed on successive casts.
values.DOTA_Tooltip_ability_base_ability_crysta: Encases an enemy unit in ice, prohibiting movement and attack, while dealing damage over time. Deals %creep_multiplier%x damage to non-ancient creeps.
Rylai channels winds from the Blueheart Glacier, imprisoning attackers in thick blocks of ice.
CHANNELED - Surrounds Crystal Maiden with 100 random icy explosions that slow enemies and deal massive damage. Lasts %abilitychanneltime% seconds.
Freezing Field also passively increases Crystal Maiden's cast range and area of effect.

Allows you to move, cast and attack during Freezing Field. Can still be interrupted by enemies. You move %shard_self_movement_speed_slow_pct%%% slower during this.

Increases total number of explosions by %shard_bonus_explosion%%%.
Once the place of her exile, Icewrack has become an anchor for Rylai's frigid onslaught.
The slow is applied on all enemies in the radius, even if they aren't hit by an explosion (lasts %slow_duration% second).
Break disables the passive effects of Frozen Expanse.

Allows you to move, cast and attack during Freezing Field. Can still be interrupted by enemies. You move %shard_self_movement_speed_slow_pct%%% slower during this. Increases total number of explosions by %shard_bonus_explosion%%%. Applies Frostbite to any unit that has been standing in the Freezing Field for over %frostbite_delay%s.
Frostbite must be drafted for Aghanim's Scepter upgrade to work.
A burst of damaging frost slows enemy movement in the targeted area.
Crystal Nova has increased radius and grants allied heroes a physical damage barrier. Barrier is increased for Crystal Maiden.
The air temperature around Rylai drops rapidly, chilling all around her to the core.
Crystal Nova provides vision in the targeted area for the duration.
Gives additional mana regeneration to all friendly units on the map. Allies within a %proximity_bonus_radius% radius of Crystal Maiden receive %proximity_bonus_factor%x the mana regeneration.
Cold temperatures promote the essence of magic, causing Rylai's presence to allow spell usage in abundance.
With Arcane Overflow and Aghanim's Scepter, cannot be activated while channeling Freezing Field.

Activating Arcane Aura temporarily increases Crystal Maiden's spell amplification and mana costs. During the duration, Crystal Maiden restores her own and her allies' Mana when casting spells. Does not affect items. Duration is paused while channeling Freezing Field.
Gives additional mana regeneration to all friendly units on the map. Allies within a %proximity_bonus_radius% radius of Crystal Maiden receive %proximity_bonus_factor%x the mana regeneration.
Cold temperatures promote the essence of magic, causing Rylai's presence to allow spell usage in abundance.
With Arcane Overflow and Aghanim's Scepter, cannot be activated while channeling Freezing Field.

Activating Arcane Aura temporarily increases Crystal Maiden's spell amplification and mana costs. During the duration, Crystal Maiden restores her own and her allies' Mana when casting spells. Does not affect items. Duration is paused while channeling Freezing Field.
values.DOTA_Tooltip_ability_base_ability_centau: Centaur leads all allies into a vicious charge causing them to move through units at max speed and slow any enemy units they trample. Trampled enemies take damage based on Centaur Warrunner's strength. Each enemy can be trampled once.
The great belt of Omexe, which labels Bradwarden as the greatest warrior of his kind, incites his fellow gladiators to follow him into barbarous combat.
Centaur counters all attacks, dealing damage back to the attacker. Returns a fixed amount plus a percentage of your strength. Deals half damage to towers.
Bradwarden has no need to parry his opponent's attacks; his armor-like hide does it for him.
Retaliate triggers when the attack hits.
After a brief windup, Centaur Warrunner slams the ground, stunning and damaging nearby enemy units. During the delay, he is disarmed but can move.
When the mighty hoof of the Warrunner touches soil, the tremors are felt far and wide.
Centaur strikes a mighty blow at melee range, damaging both himself and a small area around the target. Deals extra damage based on your strength. Centaur cannot die from Double Edge.

Double Edge damage is increased by %pct_of_incoming_damage_as_bonus%%% of the damage Centaur took in the last %stack_duration%s from enemies, up to a total of %max_damage_increase_pct%%% bonus Double Edge damage. Damage resets when Double Edge is cast.
Causes Double Edge to slow enemy heroes and increase Centaur's strength per hero hit for a short time. Duration refreshes per stack, up to a max of %shard_max_stacks% stacks.
In the spurs of combat, Bradwarden's vicious strikes sometimes cause self-inflicted collateral damage.
Double Edge deals magic type damage to both the targets and himself.
values.DOTA_Tooltip_ability_base_ability_bristl: Bristleback works himself up into a fury every time he casts a spell, increasing his movement speed and damage.
Warpath grants scaling Attack Speed instead of Damage.
'Temper, temper,' his mum always chided.  But in a fight, a temper can come in handy.
Bristleback's illusions will receive the bonuses.
Break disables the gaining of new stacks.
Break does not disable the bonuses from existing stacks.

Warpath can be activated to grant bonus attack damage and movement speed for a short duration. While Seeing Red, Bristleback's vision is reduced to a narrow cone and he does not receive vision from his allies.
Covers a target in snot, causing it to have reduced armor and movement speed for %goo_duration% seconds.  Multiple casts stack and refresh the duration.
Max stacks and armor reduction per stack increased.
Having caught a cold while stuck in the snow, Bristleback turns it to his advantage.

Shard: Access Hairball by toggling auto-cast on Quill Spray.

Must draft Nasal Goo for it to work with Hairball.
Sprays enemy units with quills dealing damage in an area of effect around Bristleback.  Deals bonus damage for every time a unit was hit by Quill Spray in the last %quill_stack_duration% seconds.
An enforcer's honor can be a prickly thing.  So can his quills.
Quill Spray damage is not reduced by damage block abilities.
Quill Spray must be drafted also to release when damage threshold reached.
Bristleback takes less damage if hit on the sides or rear.  If Bristleback takes %quill_release_threshold% damage from the rear, he releases a Quill Spray of the current level.
Instead of releasing Quill Spray from taking damage, he instead launches Nasal Goo of the current level at all nearby enemies.
Turning his back to a fight might be just the thing.
Bristleback's rear is considered to be within 70 degrees from the back.
Bristleback's side is considered to be within 110 degrees from the back.

Adds active ability to Bristleback. Bristleback rotates towards the targeted direction and, after %activation_delay%s, forcefully ejects %activation_num_quill_sprays% sequential Quill Sprays in a tight conical pattern out of his back every %activation_spray_interval%s. Bristleback's facing is locked during this time, he is disarmed, and his speed is reduced by %activation_movement_speed_pct%%%.
values.DOTA_Tooltip_ability_base_ability_axe_cu: Axe spots a weakness and strikes, dealing pure damage. When an enemy hero is killed with Culling Blade, its cooldown is reset, and all nearby allied units gain bonus movement speed and armor.
Culling Blade death cannot be prevented with other abilities like Shallow Grave.
Mogul Khan is the embodiment of battle and fury, launching into a gruesome fatality against those who dare engage the Axe in combat.
values.DOTA_Tooltip_ability_base_ability_axe_co: After a set number of attacks, Axe will perform a helix counter attack, dealing pure damage to all nearby enemies.

Counter Helix now applies a stacking debuff to enemies hit by it that causes them to deal less total attack damage to Axe. Counter Helix no longer has a cooldown and its counter advances when Axe attacks.
Illusions' counters don't increase when they attack when you have a Scepter.
Counter Helix triggers when the attack hits.
Axe is the only reinforcement this army needs.
values.DOTA_Tooltip_ability_base_ability_axe_be: Axe taunts nearby enemy units, forcing them to attack him while he gains bonus armor during the duration.
Berserker's Call applies Battle Hunger to affected units.
Berserker's Call gives Axe increased bonus armor and increases the attack speed of the affected units.
Must draft Battle Hunger for Scepter upgrade to work.
Mogul Khan's warcry taunts opponents into engaging in an unconquerable battle with the Axe.
values.DOTA_Tooltip_ability_base_ability_axe_ba: Enrages an enemy unit, causing it to take damage over time until it kills another unit or the duration ends. The damage is increased by a factor of Axe's armor. The enemy is also slowed as long as they are facing away from Axe.
Multiple instances of Battle Hunger can stack on a single target.
Destroying buildings will also remove the debuff.
Ordinary heroes cannot withstand Mogul Khan's rage for battle, such that it injures them until it is satisfied.
values.DOTA_Tooltip_ability_base_ability_antima: Mana Void
For each point of mana missing by the target unit, damage is dealt to it and surrounding enemies.  The main target is also mini-stunned.

Passively grants attack damage when an enemy hero's mana falls below %min_bonus_pct%%%, with the bonuses increasing as their mana falls further.

If the enemies mana falls below %threshold_pct%%% Anti-Mage gains the maximum amount of damage, as well as vision and True Sight of that hero. Applies to enemy heroes within %thirst_range% range. Bonuses stack per hero.
After bringing enemies to their knees, Anti-Mage punishes them for their use of the arcane arts.
Damage is calculated based on the primary target's mana, but applied to all enemies within the area of effect.
Break disables Mana Thirst vision and attack bonuses.
DAMAGE:
STUN DURATION:
RADIUS:
MANA THIRST MAX ATTACK DAMAGE:
Mana Break
Burns an opponent's mana on each attack and deals damage equal to a percentage of the mana burnt.
A modified technique of the Turstarkuri monks' peaceful ways is to turn magical energies on their owner.
Mana Break has %illusion_percentage%%% effect if caused by illusions.
MANA BURNED PER HIT:
%MAX MANA BURNED PER HIT:
%MANA BURNED AS DAMAGE:
Counterspell Ally

Counterspell burns a percentage of the countered spell's mana cost from its caster and does damage based on %damage_from_mana_drain_percent%%% of the burned mana cost, up to a maximum of %max_damage_from_mana_drain% damage per reflected spell.

Counterspell Ally may be activated to create an anti-magic shell around an allied hero that blocks and reflects any targeted spells. Any time a spell is blocked by Counterspell or Counterspell Ally, an illusion of Anti-Mage will be created next to the enemy.
The only magic that Anti-Mage will even barely tolerate... is friendship.
%REFLECTED SPELL AMP:
%MANA BURN PERCENTAGE:
Counterspell

Counterspell burns a percentage of the countered spell's mana cost from its caster and does damage based on %damage_from_mana_drain_percent%%% of the burned mana cost, up to a maximum of %max_damage_from_mana_drain% damage per reflected spell.
Passively grants magic resistance. Counterspell may be activated to create an anti-magic shell around Anti-Mage that blocks and reflects any targeted spells.
With the proper focus, Anti-Mage turns innate resistance into calculated retaliation.
Break disables the passive magic resistance.
%MAGIC RESISTANCE:
DURATION:
%REFLECTED SPELL AMP:
%MANA BURN PERCENTAGE:
Blink
Short distance teleportation that allows Anti-Mage to move in and out of combat.
In his encounter with the Dead Gods, Anti-Mage learned the value of being elusive.
You can use Blink to dodge incoming projectiles.

After casting Blink, your next Mana Break within %empowered_mana_break_duration%s burns an additional %empowered_max_burn_pct_tooltip%%% max mana and prevents the target from regenerating or gaining mana for a short duration. This debuff is undispellable. Blink Cooldown reduced by %bonus_AbilityCooldown%s.
DEBUFF DURATION:
values.DOTA_Tooltip_ability_base_ability_abaddo: Mist Coil
Abaddon releases a coil of deathly mist that can damage an enemy unit or heal a friendly unit at the cost of some of Abaddon's health.
Mist Coil also deals %damage_percentage_on_perform_attack%%% attack damage and applies effects from items and abilities. Self Damage increased when targeting enemies.
A mysterious vapor from the Font of Avernus now infuses the breath of Abaddon, who releases it at will.
DAMAGE/HEAL:
%SELF DAMAGE:
%SELF DAMAGE (ENEMY CAST):
Abaddon can not kill himself with this skill.
Curse of Avernus

Abaddon strikes an enemy, affecting them by a chilling curse, slowing them, causing them to take damage over time, and all attacks against them gain an attack speed boost. Damage over time component to buildings is reduced by %tower_dps_pct%%%.
While the baptized draw strength from the Font, the gifts of Avernus are debilitating to the uninitiated.
DURATION:
%SLOW:
DPS:
ATTACK SPEED:
Borrowed Time

When activated, dispels you and all damage dealt to you will heal instead of harm. If the ability is not on cooldown, it will automatically activate if your health falls below %hp_threshold%.

DISPEL TYPE: Strong Dispel
While Borrowed Time is active, Abaddon and enemies within %immolate_aoe% radius take %immolate_damage% damage per second.
The most unnatural of all the gifts of the Font of Avernus, this power defies mortal understanding.  What should hurt, instead heals; and what should kill gives strength anew.
HEALTH THRESHOLD:
DURATION:
DAMAGE THRESHOLD:

Increases duration. While Borrowed Time is active, anytime an ally takes more than %ally_threshold_scepter% damage while within Mist Coil's cast range of Abaddon, an individual Mist Coil will automatically fire towards that ally.
Borrowed Time can be manually activated while Abaddon is disabled, but not while silenced.  The passive activation can still occur while silenced.
Aphotic Shield does not block any damage to Abaddon when Borrowed Time is active, allowing him to heal.
Break prevents Borrowed Time from automatically activating.
Aphotic Shield

Summons dark energies around an ally unit, dispelling them and creating an all damage barrier that absorbs a set amount of damage before expiring. When the barrier is destroyed it will burst and deal damage equal to the amount it could absorb to an area around it.

DISPEL TYPE: Strong Dispel
Damage barrier amount increased, but no longer bursts upon expiration. %absorb_to_damage%%% of absorbed damage is dealt to nearby enemies. Increases cooldown.
%absorb_to_damage%%% of absorbed damage is dealt to nearby enemies.
The powers of the black mist rise to absorb attacks like the black mist absorbs light.
DURATION:
DAMAGE BARRIER:
BURST RADIUS:
RETURN DAMAGE RADIUS:
The max damage is always dealt whether the barrier is destroyed by expiring or absorbing damage.
The explosion does not damage units hidden by the fog of war.
values.DOTA_Tooltip_Ability_increment_crystal_m: Increases the duration of <font color='#F2A93D'>Crystal Nova</font>'s debuff.
When you cast <font color='#F2A93D'>Frostbite</font>, it steals armor from target per second, it lasts longer than <font color='#F2A93D'>Frostbite</font>.
When you cast <font color='#F2A93D'>Frostbite</font>, the target will take damage based on a percent of your armor amount.
When you're casting <font color='#F2A93D'>Freezing Field</font>, all enemies affected will have their spell ampllification and attack damage reduced.
values.DOTA_Tooltip_Ability_talent_crystal_maid: When attacked casts a <font color='#F2A93D'>Crystal Nova</font> to attacker with a <font color='#9ab3fd'>smaller radius</font>.\n\n<font color='#9ab3fd'>This effect has a cooldown</font>
Allow the <font color='#F2A93D'>Crystal Nova</font> one to be self-casted (pressing two times), when self-casted it'll create extra explosions.
When it comes from within, the power is frightening.
values.DOTA_Tooltip_Ability_special_ability_cry:
On activate freeze yourself, making you invunerable and frozen for a short duration.

While frozen, you will be <font color='#F2A93D'>immune</font> to any damage and status effects, but also <font color='#c03343'>unable to move or act</font>.

<font color='#9ab3fd'>Can be cancelled by reactivating the ability.</font>
You should just embrace the absolute zero
values.DOTA_Tooltip_Ability_talent_crystal_maid:
On activate freeze yourself, making you invunerable and frozen for a short duration.

While frozen, you will be <font color='#F2A93D'>immune</font> to any damage and status effects, but also <font color='#c03343'>unable to move or act</font>.

<font color='#9ab3fd'>Can be cancelled by reactivating the ability.</font>
You should just embrace the absolute zero
It blocks an ability casted against you, the blocking drains a percent of original ability mana cost.\nIf you don't have enough mana, the block doesn't activate.
You can cast <font color='#F2A93D'> Frostbite </font> on youserlf or allies to increase armor and reducing movespeed.
Metal is for dummies, use ice baby!
Sometimes touching the ice isn't so refreshing...
When casting <font color='#F2A93D'>Crystal Nova</font>, all affected enemies will have their COOLDOWN increased
values.DOTA_Tooltip_Ability_increment_crystal_m: <font color='#F2A93D'>Arcane Aura</font> provides to you spell amplification based on a percentage of your mana regeneration.
<font color='#F2A93D'>Crystal Nova</font> deals extra damage to targets based on the difference of your movement speed and the target's movement speed.

When you inflicts <font color='#5c94d2'>magical damage</font> to an unit, applies a debuff that causes <font color='#F2A93D'>extra damage</font> on next <font color='#5c94d2'>magical damage</font> that you make and renews the duration.
<font color='#F2A93D'>Frostbite</font> slows the target, but <font color='#c31717'>doesn't freeze it anymore</font>
values.DOTA_Tooltip_Ability_talent_crystal_maid: Awakes your coldblood decreasing your mana usage and the cooldown

After casting a <font color='#F2A93D'>Crystal Nova</font>, an <font color='#F2A93D'>Ice Orb</font> will be created and after <font color='#F2A93D'>%delay% second</font> it seeks out the nearest enemy unit inside the explosion's area and deals <font color='#5c94d2'>magic damage</font> based on your <font color='#5c94d2'>intelligence</font> atribute
When casting a <font color='#F2A93D'>Crystal Nova</font>, <font color='#F2A93D'>teleport yourself</font> to the center of explosion
For each %threshold% of magical damage dealt, releases an Ice Orb that deals <font color='#5c94d2'>magical damage based on your Intelligence</font> to the target the last target.
The Ice Orb is released when the accumulated damage reaches the threshold.\n
The Ice Orb doesn't trigger another ice orb.\n
If target dies before the ice orb is released, another enemy nearby him will be the new target.
values.DOTA_Tooltip_Ability_talent_antimage_sha: When you attack an enemy, a shadow comes into the world to attack the target.
The shadow is a clone of you, so it has the same stats and items of you.\n
The shadow cannot create another shadow\n
The shadow is considered an illusion on item / abilities
values.DOTA_Tooltip_modifier_talent_crystal_mai: Your cooldown has been reduced by %MODIFIER_PROPERTY_COOLDOWN_PERCENTAGE%%%.
values.DOTA_Tooltip_modifier_frostbite_amputati: When attacked, she will disarm the attacker.
The ability will not take effect for a while.
values.DOTA_Tooltip_modifier_talent_crystal_mai: You'll block next ability but will spend mana for it.
You'll not block abilities until block is re-enable
Your armor is increased by %MODIFIER_PROPERTY_PHYSICAL_ARMOR_BONUS% but your movespeed was reduced by %MODIFIER_PROPERTY_MOVESPEED_BONUS_PERCENTAGE%%%
values.DOTA_Tooltip_modifier_increment_crystal_: Receiving %MODIFIER_PROPERTY_SPELL_AMPLIFY_PERCENTAGE%%% spell amplification based on mana regeneration.
values.DOTA_Tooltip_modifier_talent_crystal_mai: The effect of Frost Teleportation cannot be used yet.
